reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación, bien mantenida y personal de venta de combustible con excelente trato y servicios. Baños impecables. Ademas el Servicompras con limpieza impecable y servicio excelente. Ademas recibí muy buena atención de turismo por parte el Concesionario y jefe de la Estación. Se las recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
A very good station, well-maintained, with excellent service and friendly fuel attendants. The restrooms are spotless. The convenience store is also impeccably clean and offers excellent service. I also received very good tourist information from the concessionaire and station manager. I highly recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dXZhWFlnEAE
